chapter_title.en: On silence Except when Speaking what is Good, Abandonment of what does not concern one, and Slander

text: فضالة بن نزار عن الحسين بن عبد الله قال: قال أبو جعفر عليه السلام: من كف عن اعراض الناس أقاله الله نفسه يوم القيامة ومن كف غضبه عن الناس كف الله عنه غضبه يوم القيامة.

en.shaykh-tahir-ridha-jaffer: 9.Faḍālah ibn Nizāz [1] narrated from al-Ḥusayn ibn ʿAbdillāh who said, “Abū Jaʿfar [al-Bāqir] (a) said, ‘One who refrains from [impugning] the honor of people, Allah will pardon him [and protect his reputation] onthe Day of Resurrection, and whoever restrains his anger from the people, Allah will restrain His anger from him on the Day of Resurrection.’”
